tweets.author: CavanXy
tweets.text:
We are yet to see the cycle-top buyers capitulate their coins, which is historically a good indication that the cyclical lows are in.

It does look like we have the macro recipe for it in the coming month or two.

If presented, I think buying a 5-handle bitcoin in the next month https://t.co/ujEfBInyGm

tweets.author: CavanXy
tweets.text:
Regarding US equities

I think if you are a frustrated bear here, which I'm starting to sense there are, I think you simply have to be patient. I'm seeing a subtle shift in sentiment towards equities being impossible to short/go down, right when they look most vulnerable to me. https://t.co/XfigEDkjjo

tweets.author: CavanXy
tweets.text:
When Bitcoin rallies against the grain of banks, it usually ends up being a local rally rather than a structural swing higher.

Something to keep in mind if adding fresh longs here. https://t.co/Q4PWFwc2fd

tweets.author: CavanXy
tweets.text:
Bond volatility is starting to god candle

Last time we had a 1-Week % change of this magnitude was the March banking crisis; before that, June 2022 

It would be truly wild if the 2022 fractal continued to play out this final leg

Who knows what's in store, but we'll watch it https://t.co/Jg5HmxoIoM
